string 2: Oh! It's you! I didn't think I'd be seeing you again!
{next}I came to hear what you had to say.
{next}How've you been?
{next}I hoped I'd never see you again.

You know, I was hoping it'd be you who'd hear me out. I
couldn't be happier to see you!

Better, thanks. My injuries have mostly healed. All thanks
to you and Shellmon...
...I guess I can't blame you. I am a Titan, after all.

Anyway, here's the thing. I'm concerned about Sharkmon, my
old boss who we fought before.

Seizing control of the Current is the Titans' greatest
desire, and Sharkmon never gives up.

You see, Sharkmon gave up too easily for my liking. He has
to be plotting something...
{next}I'll look into it.
{next}You sure you're not just imagining things?
{next}I'll beat Sharkmon as many times as it takes!
You mean... you believe me?! Oh, thank you!

I know because I was always with Sharkmon. He isn't one to
give up easily like that.

I appreciate your courage, but... there's more to this than
just defeating Sharkmon.

If we're going to investigate the ocean floor, we'll need
Submarimon's help.

Although, I'm sure Submarimon has concerns of his own... He
may have headed off somewhere.

Even so, I want to at least try to go see Submarimon. Why
don't you come along?

...No sign of Submarimon. I was kind of expecting that, but,
still...

What a waste! And after I dragged you all the way out here
and everything...

Haha... What a joke I am. Is this really the best I can
manage?
I heard every word of that, ya salty old dog.

Keep up that sorta weak talk and ye'll soon be in deep water
with me, matey!
Submarimon...!

I was just going down for a bit of a dive, ya see, and I
found a rather suspicious place.

Thing is, 'tis more trouble than I reckon I can handle on me
own. Mind pitching in?
{next}'Twon't be no trouble t'all!
{next}What makes this place so suspicious?
{next}Aren't we already deep in the water with you?
Raring to go, are ya? I like the cut of yer jib!

I been looking into some things, meself, ya see. Me matey's
not alone in its suspicions.

Don't ya know that expression? Well, I s'pose ya could say
the deep water's the problem.

There's something fishy about the water deep below near the
bottom of the sea.

That certainly sounds like it's worth investigating. I'd
better come along, too.

I knew I could count on ya, matey! Now, what do YOU say?
Ready to go for a dive with us?
{next}Let's go!
{end}Not just yet.
Then let's be off!

I'll dive down for another look while ya go get prepped. We
can all leave when ya return.
I'll wait here. Come back as soon as you're ready!

When ya meet back up with me matey, here, I'll swim up in a
jiffy. See ya soon!

I'll be taking ya full speed ahead on this trip! Next thing
ya know, we'll be there!

This here be what's suspect, if ya ask me. What do ya make
of it?

You're right... As soon as we got here, I found it oddly
hard to breathe...

We'll have a hard time if we stay too long. We'd better look
around quickly.
...ack... Give it back... Give it back!
Wh-What's this all about?!
The Current... The Current...!
The Current?! What are you talking about?
Stop! Get back! That little one's lost its head!
Give back... the Current!
It's going to attack!

Did... Did we win? That sort of felt like a hollow
victory...
...Huh? Why am I here? What've I been doing?
You don't remember?

Last thing I knew, I was thinking that it was getting hard
to breathe. Then, nothing.

So that means... Aha! I get it now! I was right to think
Sharkmon wouldn't go quietly.
{next}You think Sharkmon set some sort of trap?
{next}Because this drunk was causing trouble?
{next}You're saying we have to pay some fee?

I see we're on the same wavelength. I knew you were a sharp
one.

Hey! Crabmon isn't drunk. Besides, I'm talking about
something else.

Do you ever think of anything besides money? That can't be
good for you...

Well, don't be keeping us in suspense, matey. If ya know
something, out with it, already!

Sharkmon seems to have done something to the Current before
leaving.

You see, I found a small vein of the Current. It's at the
edge of the sea, but it connects to the rest of the Current.

Even us finding it hard to breathe could be from reduced
energy flow due to tampering.
Aye, and that'd explain why this little one lost its head!
Right. That's what I think, too.
Sorry. I didn't mean to cause trouble...

You weren't in control of your actions. Don't worry about
it.
So... what do ya plan to do now, matey?

My old boss, Sharkmon, is gone, so I need to go find someone
who's an even bigger boss.

Then I'm going to work hard, until I'm put in charge of the
squad that patrols this area.
{next}You'll be doing the work of a Titan again?
{next}You'd betray Shellmon like that?!
{next}It'll have to be a big fish who takes you in.

Well, I'll have to if I'm going to get promoted. But this
time, I have a new goal.

No! That's not it at all! That's the last thing I would do.
You have to believe me!

That's true. Although, to be honest, I doubt Sharkmon was
ever given that much authority.

Once I become the leader of this area, I can order the
others not to cause trouble.

Ya'd fix it so Shellmon could come back safe and sound?
Shiver me timbers, ya be brave!
It may take some time, but I'll make it happen. I swear.

Well... I'd say we'd best be going now. We'll soon be losing
our own heads, otherwise.
Yeah, let's get out of here!
I'm in your debt again. Here. Take this as thanks.

And this is goodbye. I need to go back to being a Titan—to
protect what matters most.
Thanks for everything! And take care!

If you're ready to go investigate that suspicious location,
talk to Submarimon.
